title: elaphoglossum negrosensis
intro: Elaphoglossum negrosensis, also known as Negros Elaphoglossum, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum negrosensis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. The leaves can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal remedies, and have been traditionally used in the Philippines to treat fever, cough, and other health conditions.
